name: dark-money-the-hidden-history-of-the-billionaires-behind-the-rise-of-the-radical-right
description: Jane Mayer's investigative account of how the Koch brothers and their billionaire network built a secret political machine that reshaped American politics and policy.
useCase: Understand how untraceable political money flows through the American system, who funds it, and how it affects elections, legislation, and public policy.
knownRisks: Investigative journalism — readers may question some sourcing
Partisan topic — some may disagree with the framing
Dense with names, dates, and organizations
